title: Garhoon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Garhoon''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of vampiric [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]]. [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] presided over a court case between the Garhoons and their prey. At the end of the case, the prey returned to the Garhoons, saddening [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1stm}}
